crime.value: Double murder of newlyweds - husband shot multiple times, wife hit by car then shot on road
crime.quote: You're under arrest for the murders of Mr. and Mrs. Cizio.

victim.value: Brandon and Sierra Cizio, newlyweds on honeymoon - targeted because Sierra married Brandon who was the killer's ex-husband
victim.quote: I couldn't just let that bitch marry the love of my life.

closed_world.value: Honeymoon lodge rental area in Banks - limited location constraining suspect pool
closed_world.quote: they had rented the lodge they were staying in for their honeymoon

culprit_and_motive.value: Alex Cizio (Brandon's ex-wife) killed them because she couldn't accept her ex-husband remarrying
culprit_and_motive.quote: I couldn't just let that bitch marry the love of my life.

resolution.value: Physical evidence (fingerprints on gun, tire tracks, gun permit) plus confession leads to arrest
resolution.quote: We knew that the prints we lifted from the gun belonged to her.

investigator.value: Detective Odessa McNiel Clarissa Odele, official police detective leading the investigation

suspect_architecture.value: Single suspect with personal motive: Alex Cizio, ex-wife of victim Brandon, driven by jealousy over his remarriage. No differentiated suspect pool - direct path to perpetrator.
suspect_architecture.quote: she was married to Brandon Cizio before he married Sierra

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence presented to reader alongside investigation: fingerprints on gun, tire tracks, gun permit registration, prior marriage connection all revealed as discovered.
clue_fairness.quote: the prints we lifted from the gun belonged to her. Then we matched the tire tracks

social_world.value: Police hierarchy and media pressure structure: Chief directing Detective Odele, media complications requiring leadership changes, institutional chain of command.
social_world.quote: Marks is having himself a hell of a time with the media, and needs someone else to take things over

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence accumulation leading to confession: fingerprints, tire tracks, gun registration, and marriage records create overwhelming case resulting in voluntary confession.
reveal_mechanic.quote: I couldn't help myself. I couldn't just let that bitch marry the love of my life

media_and_audience.value: Media pressure complicating police work, requiring personnel reassignment to manage public/press attention at crime scene.
media_and_audience.quote: Marks is having himself a hell of a time with the media

investigator_wound.value: Personal connection to perpetrator: Detective Odele recognizes Alex Cizio as 'an old friend' whose marriage was previously 'crushed', creating emotional complexity.
investigator_wound.quote: immediately recognized the name of an old friend of mine, Alex Cizio

_meta.title: ebook odessa mcniel clarissa odele and the case of the slain newlyweds
